channel.title: Physics on ChenLi
channel.description: Recent content in Physics on ChenLi

item.title: Book review: Lost in Math: How Beauty Leads Physics Astray
item.description: This is a review of Lost in Math: How Beauty Leads Physics Astray, written by Sabine Hossenfelder. So there is this basic conflict between beauty and resources, where beauty means the standard we use to judge whether a theory is good or not, while resources means money, time, energy, etc. The latter one is something we cannot avoid, but the first one is something we can change, and I truly hope so.
